claim: Ren'Py's Movie displayable freezes on variable-frame-rate video; encode a CONSTANT-fps MP4, and never wrap a Movie in a per-frame transform (use a static Movie + a black overlay for fades).
subject: renpy

claim: Stable Audio Open 1.0 is a gated Hugging Face model and needs torchsde installed; don't prompt it for silence, it won't reliably produce it.
subject: stable-audio-open

claim: When making pixel art, never re-quantize art that is already pixel-art; use an adaptive palette (not a warm/location palette), skip dithering, and judge at 1:1 zoom.
subject: pixel-art

claim: ACE-Step 1.5 is DiT-only and runs music generation on a single RTX 3090.
subject: ace-step

claim: RIFE frame interpolation can turn any clip into a seamless loop by interpolating from the last frame back to the first.
subject: rife

claim: In Claude/MCP, image observations arrive as tool_result blocks of type image (the model Reads the PNG); a screenshot tool firing is NOT the same as pixels entering context, so verify on the image block, not the capture call.
subject: mcp
